summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Arabic RTL marketplace app. All core features working correctly including navigation, forms, search, favorites, and responsive design. Minor UI overlay issue with Emergent badge blocking some clicks.

ui_bugs.issue: Badge overlay blocks some navigation clicks, requiring force clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Force clicks work around the issue

passed_tests: Home page loads with Arabic RTL layout (dir='rtl', lang='ar')
Categories grid displays all 6 categories (عقارات، سيارات، أثاث، وظائف، خدمات، إلكترونيات)
Ads list displays 6 items with real images and Arabic text
Search bar functional with Arabic placeholder text
Bottom navigation works (الرئيسية، المفضلة، الحساب)
Special floating FAB button navigates to add listing page with animations
Favorite button toggle on ad cards works correctly
Login page with email and password fields functional
Register page with all required fields (name, email, phone, password, confirm password)
Add listing form with all fields (title, description, price, category, location, phone, seller name)
Form validation on register page (password match validation working)
Success message on add listing submission with auto-navigation
Favorites page shows favorited items correctly
Account page with menu items and logout functionality
Page transitions with framer-motion animations working
Responsive mobile-first design with max-w-md container
Arabic fonts (Tajawal and Cairo) rendering correctly
Gradient colors throughout the app (#4F46E5 → #06B6D4)
Mock data with real Unsplash/Pexels images loading properly
Font Awesome icons displaying correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adjusting z-index of Emergent badge to prevent click interference, but this is a minor cosmetic issue that doesn't affect core functionality
